declared.title: Kenya: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 (real page title matched: "Kenya: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report", coverage period "June 1, 2024 - May 31, 2025"). Fourth Kenya data point (2022/2023/2024/2025), completing the most recent year available. Coverage-contribution value: this edition documents the June 2024 tax-protest-related internet shutdown (~7 hours) and mass arrests -- Kenya's most severe single-year decline in this corpus's whole Freedom House series, and a direct topical complement to this corpus's other 2024-period entries (Access Now, CIPESA). Full content not yet read in detail beyond the coverage-period/shutdown confirmation; specific findings to be logged at semantic review.
